email.subject: New pull request on your repository

email.bodyText: Read our latest articles on threat intelligence and incident response trends.

email.subject: Security alert for your Google Account
email.bodyText: A new sign-in on your account was detected. If this was you, no action is needed.

email.bodyText: Thank you for applying to the Security Analyst internship. We will review your materials and respond within two weeks.

email.subject: Sprint 12 standup notes
